name: Russian Beef Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: Cooked Mashed Potatoes or Cooked Noodles or Cooked Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef into 1/2 inch strips and place in a plastic bag with 3 tablespoons of flour and salt. Shake until the meat is evenly coated.
2. In a heavy skillet or Dutch oven, heat oil. Add the meat strips and brown slowly, stirring often.
3. Add onion, garlic, Coca-Cola, and 1/4 cup water to the pan; mix well.
4. Cover and simmer for 30 to 45 minutes, or until the meat is fork tender.
5. In a bowl, mix 2 tablespoons of flour with 1/2 cup water until smooth. Stir into the meat along with Worcestershire sauce and undrained mushrooms.
6. Stir and cook until thickened, about 2 to 3 minutes. (If making ahead for reheating later, do not add sour cream now. Reheat, then complete the recipe directions.)
7. Stir in the sour cream and heat gently just until the gravy simmers.
8. Sprinkle with parsley and serve over mashed potatoes, noodles, or rice.
